TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ciyaw_Anang_Taywan_Yancumincu, title = Ciyaw_Anang_Taywan_Yancumincu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ciyaw_Anang_Taywan_Yancumincu} }

S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Taywan Yancumincu Taywan Yincumincu hanay- u naitiniyay tu a ma'urip a nikasaniyaru', u tatudung tu nu "Nantaw hananay a kitakit", u rasras nira paniyaru'an. Caay ka sacacay sanay ku niyaru nu Yancumin, mapatirengay nu Seyhu i mitini sabaw tu enem ku ni patirengan. Tangasa i 2016 a miheca nu sepatay a bulad i, 54 a emang 8 a malebut lima a patekenan sepat a pulu' ira ku walu nu nikaaluman nu tamdaw, u belung nu niasip Makala tu 2.33% ku maru'ay tina Taywanan. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ tajwan janʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħanaj- o~u~u naitinijaj to~u~u a maʡo~u~urip a nikasanijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u no~u~u "nantaw ħananaj a kitakit", o~u~u rasras nira panijaro~u~uʡan. ʦaaj ka saʦaʦaj sanaj ko~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u janʦo~u~umin, mapatirəŋaj no~u~u səjħo~u~u i mitini sab~b~vaw to~u~u ənəm ko~u~u ni patirəŋan. taŋasa i **** a miħəʦa no~u~u səpataj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, ** a əmaŋ * a maɾəb~b~vo~u~ut ɾima a patəkənan səpat a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u no~u~u nikaaɾo~u~uman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ no~u~u niasip makaɾa to~u~u *.**% ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj tina tajwanan. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: Ciyaw Anang Taywan Yancumincu Taywan Yincumincu hanay- u naitiniyay tu a ma'urip a nikasaniyaru', u tatudung tu nu "Nantaw hananay a kitakit", u rasras nira paniyaru'an. Caay ka sacacay sanay ku niyaru nu Yancumin, mapatirengay nu Seyhu i mitini sabaw tu enem ku ni patirengan. Tangasa i 2016 a miheca nu sepatay a bulad i, 54 a emang 8 a malebut lima a patekenan sepat a pulu' ira ku walu nu nikaaluman nu tamdaw, u belung nu niasip Makala tu 2.33% ku maru'ay tina Taywanan. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijaw anaŋ tajwan janʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħanaj- o~u~u naitinijaj to~u~u a maʡo~u~urip a nikasanijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u no~u~u "nantaw ħananaj a kitakit", o~u~u rasras nira panijaro~u~uʡan. ʦaaj ka saʦaʦaj sanaj ko~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u janʦo~u~umin, mapatirəŋaj no~u~u səjħo~u~u i mitini sab~b~vaw to~u~u ənəm ko~u~u ni patirəŋan. taŋasa i **** a miħəʦa no~u~u səpataj a b~b~vo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ i, ** a əmaŋ * a maɾəb~b~vo~u~ut ɾima a patəkənan səpat a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u waɾo~u~u no~u~u nikaaɾo~u~uman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u b~b~vəɾo~u~uŋ no~u~u niasip makaɾa to~u~u *.**% ko~u~u maro~u~uʡaj tina tajwanan. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
